entry.title: Agloe: What the Map Makers of the 1930s can Teach us About Protecting our Data in 2018
entry.summary: What does the little town of Agloe, Colchester, NY have in common with modern day data protection? Why when I look for directions to Agloe, Colchester, NY do I only get a partial match?
